programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Dodgers visit the Houston Astros for the second game of a three-game interleague series at Daikin Park. The Dodgers enter the series as one of the league's top teams, while the Astros are looking to climb the AL West standings.

programme.title: Live: MLB on TBS: Closer
programme.desc: Major League Baseball postgame interviews, analysis and highlights.

programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding; Dwight plans to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's ex-boyfriend Zack learns that he is infertile, so he asks Leonard for help; Koothrappali attempts to mend things with his ex-fiancee Anu.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy are thrilled when their super asymmetry theory is proven by two physicists, until they try to kick Amy off the Nobel nomination; Bernadette has a big success at work.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is thrilled to help Bernadette and Wolowitz navigate bureaucratic paperwork, until he discovers they are breaking the law; Leonard is disappointed when his friends exclude him from a scientific project.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: NBA star Bam Adebayo pulls WNBA MVP A'ja Wilson into an uncomfortable autograph scandal; Anthony Davis drops NFL star safety Quentin Lake and NFL analyst Jay Glazer into chaos during a competition show gone wrong.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: Anthony Davis pranks former NFL tight end Marcedes Lewis when a routine valet drop-off turns into joyrides and errands; NBA coach Jason Kidd sends NBA superstar Cooper Flagg into a rookie symposium that devolves into awkwardness and a marital meltdown.
